TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = MiloŇ° Zeman = Mntucing hngkawas 1944 idas 9 jiyax 28 ka MiloŇ° Zeman ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Czechia ta sayang o kiya ka MiloŇ° Zeman, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 3 jiyax 8 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. MiloŇ° Zeman MiloŇ° Zeman (kari Czechia: MiloŇ° Zeman, phnang kari Czechia, ('m…™lo É 'z…õman) ; kngkawas 1944 idas 9 diyax 28Ôľć) ka 1 Czechia Seyji Jnwu mi Keyjaycya, Soto Czechia saya. MiloŇ° Zeman pa kngkawas 2013 idas 1 mniq Czechia u mwaya Soto msdurux seyngkyo cida daw wada mangal, kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2018 kcka Soto seyngkyo cida u wada mndungus bay lmutuc mbiyax mangal. Kndusan MiloŇ° Zeman pa kngkawas1944 idas 9 diyax 28 MiloŇ° Zeman u pntuting mniq Tukcka Czechia na alang mkbrnux Kolin Su, mnhdu muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Keyjay Prague. Kngkawas 1996 dhuq kngkawas 1998 pa MiloŇ° Zeman ngalan Czechia Conggiying Gicyo, kngkawas 1998 dhuq kngkawas 2002 cida ngalan Congri Czechia. Kngkawas 1993 dhuq kngkawas 2001 cida, MiloŇ° Zeman u ngalan mpdudul Czechia Syakay Mincu Tang. Mbiyax mangal Soto Kndadax 1992 prading, Soto Czechia pa snpeyyah Conggiying mi Sanggiying meytaq hyo umau, diyax iyax qphan u 5 knkawas, malu mntxal lmutuc qpahun Soto. Kngkawas 2012 idas 8 cida, Czechia Kwohuy u wada snburah smmalu waya seyngkyo Soto, muda waya msdurux seyngkyo, snpeyyah kngkawas 2013 prading muda. Rikisi Czechia pa mwaya bay muda msdurux seyngkyo ka Soto u mniq kngkawas 2013 idas 1 muda, 9 hiyi ka knkana miyah pnsung Soto seyngkyo. Mniq idas 1 diyax 11 mi diyax 12 na mn1 seyngkyo cida, uka ana taxa hosweynjn ka mbiyax mangal knou balay hyo, so kiya tumn1 knou bay mnangal hyo ka MiloŇ° Zeman mi tuhuy pneyyah Pnsltudan Seykining Knrana Tang na Karl Schwarzenberg (Huku Congri mi Waycyawbu Bucyo saya) idas 1 diyax 25 mi diyax 26 cida daw mtmay muda tumn2 meytaq hyo, hiti balay daw MiloŇ° Zeman ka wada manal 2,717,405 hyo (54.8% mnangal hyo ryu) wada niya ini baka ka mnangal 2,241,171 hyo (mnangal hyo ryu 45.19%) na Karl Schwarzenberg. Kngkawas 2018 cida pa MiloŇ° Zeman u wada mbiyax tikuh balay hyo mbiyax mangal lmutuc Soto. Msdalih quri Cyokoku MiloŇ° Zeman kndadax kngkawas 2013 dhuq ngalan Soto cida, pkmalu balay quri Cyoka Jnmin Konghkwo. Mnusa Peycing tumal Kining Sediq Cyokoku Knciyuk Nihong Mccbu Mi Qnlangan Hantay Fasis Mbiyax Mccbu 70 Knkawas Taykay weyping, MiloŇ° Zeman ka murux balay mtumal pnsdhuwan weyping na Qnlhangan Weynso Omong.Kngkawas 2016 srnabaw cida, Sicinping homung Czechia iyax cida, MiloŇ° Zeman pa dmuwi uxay bay mnuda sqqita niya Weynso Qnlhangan icil snbeyhing bay muda snturung Sicinping. Kngkawas 2017 idas 5 cida, MiloŇ° Zeman u nsung balay musa Peycing tumal 1 Wela 1 Elu Kwoci Hcwo Kawhong Rwontan. MiloŇ° Zeman u wada dha angalan msupu snbari sediq Cyokoku Yey Cyeynming na kojyo Hwasin Nengweyn niqan knbeyhing bay knmalu brihan pnluban dha, dhuq Yeys kngkawas 2018 wada qrapan cida. Kngkawas 2019 idas 1, snquri Czechia Qnlhangan Wangrwo Mi Sinsi Anjeyng Cyu rmngaw Hwawi Kojyo pa smliq anjeyng niya pquri Czechia, cmiyuk kari ka MiloŇ° Zeman, pnosa kari niya Czechia Qnlhangan Wangrwo Mi Sinsi Anjeyng Cyu pa uka pusu dungus niya. So niyi ka pnklan niya kari MiloŇ° Zeman pa wada cyukan kari Cyoka Jnmin Konghkwo Waycyawbu mpkla kari niya Lukang "Cansang". Kngkawas 2019 idas 4 cida, MiloŇ° Zeman u musa Cyokoku tumal tu2 kay 1 Wela 1 Elu Kwoci Hcwo Kawhong Rwentan mi Kngkawas 2019 Peycing Sweynhuy psdhu prading. Kngkawas 2020 idas 9 diyax 7, Czechia Sanggiying Gicyo Witci ka mwela duma sediq miyah homung Taiwan kiya mi wada smriqan Cyokoku, quri so niyi u pkla meyti ka MiloŇ° Zeman u rmngaw Witci homung Taiwan ka "Mlaqi niya Tmhri". Wada runan Narux Uhan Cyokoku (COVID-19/Narux 2019 Burah Kwancwang Pingtu) pa Czechia u ini sangay mrana ka narux niyi, kngkawas 2021 idas 3 diyax 3 cida, Soto Czechia Pkla Kari Singbung Iju Ohucek ka pkla kari, Soto Czechia MiloŇ° Zeman u wada snquri Cyokoku meysa iyu qumi Narux Uhan Cyokoku (COVID-19 Burah Kwancwang Pingtu).
S.PHON: = milo* *…ôman = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka milo* *…ôman ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ¶*…ô ¶ńßia ta sajaŇč o kija ka milo* *…ôman, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. milo* *…ôman milo* *…ôman (ka…ĺi ¶*…ô ¶ńßia: milo* *…ôman, pńßnaŇč ka…ĺi ¶*…ô ¶ńßia, ('m*lo* '**man) ; kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ***) ka * ¶*…ô ¶ńßia s…ô…üi …ünwu mi k…ô…üaj ¶ja, soto ¶*…ô ¶ńßia saja. milo* *…ôman pa kŇčkawas **** idas * mniq ¶*…ô ¶ńßia u mwaja soto msdu…ĺux s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida daw wada maŇčal, kija mi mniq kŇčkawas **** k ¶ka soto s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida u wada mnduŇčus baj lmutu ¶ mbijax maŇčal. kndusan milo* *…ôman pa kŇčkawas**** idas * dijax ** milo* *…ôman u pntutiŇč mniq tuk ¶ka ¶*…ô ¶ńßia na alaŇč mkb…ĺnux kolin su, mnńßdu mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč k…ô…üaj p…ĺagu…ô. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** pa milo* *…ôman Ňčalan ¶*…ô ¶ńßia ¶oŇčgijiŇč gi ¶jo, kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida Ňčalan ¶oŇč…ĺi ¶*…ô ¶ńßia. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, milo* *…ôman u Ňčalan mpdudul ¶*…ô ¶ńßia sjakaj min ¶u taŇč. mbijax maŇčal soto kndadax **** p…ĺadiŇč, soto ¶*…ô ¶ńßia pa snp…ôjańß ¶oŇčgijiŇč mi saŇčgijiŇč m…ôtaq ńßjo umau, dijax ijax qpńßan u * knkawas, malu mntxal lmutu ¶ qpańßun soto. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, ¶*…ô ¶ńßia kwońßuj u wada snbu…ĺańß smmalu waja s…ôŇčkjo soto, muda waja msdu…ĺux s…ôŇčkjo, snp…ôjańß kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč muda. …ĺikisi ¶*…ô ¶ńßia pa mwaja baj muda msdu…ĺux s…ôŇčkjo ka soto u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * muda, * ńßiji ka knkana mijańß pnsuŇč soto s…ôŇčkjo. mniq idas * dijax ** mi dijax ** na mn* s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida, uka ana taxa ńßosw…ôn…ün ka mbijax maŇčal knou balaj ńßjo, so kija tumn* knou baj mnaŇčal ńßjo ka milo* *…ôman mi tuńßuj pn…ôjańß pnsltudan s…ôkiniŇč kn…ĺana taŇč na ka…ĺl s ¶ńßwa…ĺ*…ônb…ô…ĺg (ńßuku ¶oŇč…ĺi mi waj ¶jawbu bu ¶jo saja) idas * dijax ** mi dijax ** ¶ida daw mtmaj muda tumn* m…ôtaq ńßjo, ńßiti balaj daw milo* *…ôman ka wada manal *,***,*** ńßjo (**.*% mnaŇčal ńßjo …ĺju) wada nija ini baka ka mnaŇčal *,***,*** ńßjo (mnaŇčal ńßjo …ĺju **.**%) na ka…ĺl s ¶ńßwa…ĺ*…ônb…ô…ĺg. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida pa milo* *…ôman u wada mbijax tikuńß balaj ńßjo mbijax maŇčal lmutu ¶ soto. msdalińß qu…ĺi ¶jokoku milo* *…ôman kndadax kŇčkawas **** dńßuq Ňčalan soto ¶ida, pkmalu balaj qu…ĺi ¶joka …ünmin koŇčńßkwo. mnusa p…ô ¶iŇč tumal kiniŇč s…ôdiq ¶jokoku kn ¶ijuk nińßoŇč m ¶ ¶bu mi qnlaŇčan ńßantaj *asis mbijax m ¶ ¶bu ** knkawas tajkaj w…ôpiŇč, milo* *…ôman ka mu…ĺux balaj mtumal pnsdńßuwan w…ôpiŇč na qnlńßaŇčan w…ônso omoŇč.kŇčkawas **** s…ĺnabaw ¶ida, si ¶inpiŇč ńßomuŇč ¶*…ô ¶ńßia ijax ¶ida, milo* *…ôman pa dmuwi uxaj baj mnuda sqqita nija w…ônso qnlńßaŇčan i ¶il snb…ôńßiŇč baj muda sntu…ĺuŇč si ¶inpiŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, milo* *…ôman u nsuŇč balaj musa p…ô ¶iŇč tumal * w…ôla * …ôlu kwo ¶i ńß ¶wo kawńßoŇč …ĺwontan. milo* *…ôman u wada dńßa aŇčalan msupu snba…ĺi s…ôdiq ¶jokoku j…ô ¶j…ônmiŇč na ko…üjo ńßwasin n…ôŇčw…ôn niqan knb…ôńßiŇč baj knmalu b…ĺińßan pnluban dńßa, dńßuq j…ôs kŇčkawas **** wada q…ĺapan ¶ida. kŇčkawas **** idas *, snqu…ĺi ¶*…ô ¶ńßia qnlńßaŇčan waŇč…ĺwo mi sinsi an…ü…ôŇč ¶ju …ĺmŇčaw ńßwawi ko…üjo pa smliq an…ü…ôŇč nija pqu…ĺi ¶*…ô ¶ńßia, ¶mijuk ka…ĺi ka milo* *…ôman, pnosa ka…ĺi nija ¶*…ô ¶ńßia qnlńßaŇčan waŇč…ĺwo mi sinsi an…ü…ôŇč ¶ju pa uka pusu duŇčus nija. so niji ka pnklan nija ka…ĺi milo* *…ôman pa wada ¶jukan ka…ĺi ¶joka …ünmin koŇčńßkwo waj ¶jawbu mpkla ka…ĺi nija lukaŇč " ¶ansaŇč". kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, milo* *…ôman u musa ¶jokoku tumal tu* kaj * w…ôla * …ôlu kwo ¶i ńß ¶wo kawńßoŇč …ĺw…ôntan mi kŇčkawas **** p…ô ¶iŇč sw…ônńßuj psdńßu p…ĺadiŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, ¶*…ô ¶ńßia saŇčgijiŇč gi ¶jo wit ¶i ka mw…ôla duma s…ôdiq mijańß ńßomuŇč taiwan kija mi wada sm…ĺiqan ¶jokoku, qu…ĺi so niji u pkla m…ôti ka milo* *…ôman u …ĺmŇčaw wit ¶i ńßomuŇč taiwan ka "mlaqi nija tmńß…ĺi". wada …ĺunan na…ĺux uńßan ¶jokoku ( ¶o*id-**/na…ĺux **** bu…ĺańß kwan ¶waŇč piŇčtu) pa ¶*…ô ¶ńßia u ini saŇčaj m…ĺana ka na…ĺux niji, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ¶ida, soto ¶*…ô ¶ńßia pkla ka…ĺi siŇčbuŇč i…üu ońßu ¶…ôk ka pkla ka…ĺi, soto ¶*…ô ¶ńßia milo* *…ôman u wada snqu…ĺi ¶jokoku m…ôsa iju qumi na…ĺux uńßan ¶jokoku ( ¶o*id-** bu…ĺańß kwan ¶waŇč piŇčtu).
S.FORM: = MiloŇ° Zeman = Mntucing hngkawas 1944 idas 9 jiyax 28 ka MiloŇ° Zeman ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Czechia ta sayang o kiya ka MiloŇ° Zeman, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 3 jiyax 8 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. MiloŇ° Zeman MiloŇ° Zeman (kari Czechia: MiloŇ° Zeman, phnang kari Czechia, ('m…™lo É 'z…õman) ; kngkawas 1944 idas 9 diyax 28Ôľć) ka 1 Czechia Seyji Jnwu mi Keyjaycya, Soto Czechia saya. MiloŇ° Zeman pa kngkawas 2013 idas 1 mniq Czechia u mwaya Soto msdurux seyngkyo cida daw wada mangal, kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2018 kcka Soto seyngkyo cida u wada mndungus bay lmutuc mbiyax mangal. Kndusan MiloŇ° Zeman pa kngkawas1944 idas 9 diyax 28 MiloŇ° Zeman u pntuting mniq Tukcka Czechia na alang mkbrnux Kolin Su, mnhdu muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Keyjay Prague. Kngkawas 1996 dhuq kngkawas 1998 pa MiloŇ° Zeman ngalan Czechia Conggiying Gicyo, kngkawas 1998 dhuq kngkawas 2002 cida ngalan Congri Czechia. Kngkawas 1993 dhuq kngkawas 2001 cida, MiloŇ° Zeman u ngalan mpdudul Czechia Syakay Mincu Tang. Mbiyax mangal Soto Kndadax 1992 prading, Soto Czechia pa snpeyyah Conggiying mi Sanggiying meytaq hyo umau, diyax iyax qphan u 5 knkawas, malu mntxal lmutuc qpahun Soto. Kngkawas 2012 idas 8 cida, Czechia Kwohuy u wada snburah smmalu waya seyngkyo Soto, muda waya msdurux seyngkyo, snpeyyah kngkawas 2013 prading muda. Rikisi Czechia pa mwaya bay muda msdurux seyngkyo ka Soto u mniq kngkawas 2013 idas 1 muda, 9 hiyi ka knkana miyah pnsung Soto seyngkyo. Mniq idas 1 diyax 11 mi diyax 12 na mn1 seyngkyo cida, uka ana taxa hosweynjn ka mbiyax mangal knou balay hyo, so kiya tumn1 knou bay mnangal hyo ka MiloŇ° Zeman mi tuhuy pneyyah Pnsltudan Seykining Knrana Tang na Karl Schwarzenberg (Huku Congri mi Waycyawbu Bucyo saya) idas 1 diyax 25 mi diyax 26 cida daw mtmay muda tumn2 meytaq hyo, hiti balay daw MiloŇ° Zeman ka wada manal 2,717,405 hyo (54.8% mnangal hyo ryu) wada niya ini baka ka mnangal 2,241,171 hyo (mnangal hyo ryu 45.19%) na Karl Schwarzenberg. Kngkawas 2018 cida pa MiloŇ° Zeman u wada mbiyax tikuh balay hyo mbiyax mangal lmutuc Soto. Msdalih quri Cyokoku MiloŇ° Zeman kndadax kngkawas 2013 dhuq ngalan Soto cida, pkmalu balay quri Cyoka Jnmin Konghkwo. Mnusa Peycing tumal Kining Sediq Cyokoku Knciyuk Nihong Mccbu Mi Qnlangan Hantay Fasis Mbiyax Mccbu 70 Knkawas Taykay weyping, MiloŇ° Zeman ka murux balay mtumal pnsdhuwan weyping na Qnlhangan Weynso Omong.Kngkawas 2016 srnabaw cida, Sicinping homung Czechia iyax cida, MiloŇ° Zeman pa dmuwi uxay bay mnuda sqqita niya Weynso Qnlhangan icil snbeyhing bay muda snturung Sicinping. Kngkawas 2017 idas 5 cida, MiloŇ° Zeman u nsung balay musa Peycing tumal 1 Wela 1 Elu Kwoci Hcwo Kawhong Rwontan. MiloŇ° Zeman u wada dha angalan msupu snbari sediq Cyokoku Yey Cyeynming na kojyo Hwasin Nengweyn niqan knbeyhing bay knmalu brihan pnluban dha, dhuq Yeys kngkawas 2018 wada qrapan cida. Kngkawas 2019 idas 1, snquri Czechia Qnlhangan Wangrwo Mi Sinsi Anjeyng Cyu rmngaw Hwawi Kojyo pa smliq anjeyng niya pquri Czechia, cmiyuk kari ka MiloŇ° Zeman, pnosa kari niya Czechia Qnlhangan Wangrwo Mi Sinsi Anjeyng Cyu pa uka pusu dungus niya. So niyi ka pnklan niya kari MiloŇ° Zeman pa wada cyukan kari Cyoka Jnmin Konghkwo Waycyawbu mpkla kari niya Lukang "Cansang". Kngkawas 2019 idas 4 cida, MiloŇ° Zeman u musa Cyokoku tumal tu2 kay 1 Wela 1 Elu Kwoci Hcwo Kawhong Rwentan mi Kngkawas 2019 Peycing Sweynhuy psdhu prading. Kngkawas 2020 idas 9 diyax 7, Czechia Sanggiying Gicyo Witci ka mwela duma sediq miyah homung Taiwan kiya mi wada smriqan Cyokoku, quri so niyi u pkla meyti ka MiloŇ° Zeman u rmngaw Witci homung Taiwan ka "Mlaqi niya Tmhri". Wada runan Narux Uhan Cyokoku (COVID-19/Narux 2019 Burah Kwancwang Pingtu) pa Czechia u ini sangay mrana ka narux niyi, kngkawas 2021 idas 3 diyax 3 cida, Soto Czechia Pkla Kari Singbung Iju Ohucek ka pkla kari, Soto Czechia MiloŇ° Zeman u wada snquri Cyokoku meysa iyu qumi Narux Uhan Cyokoku (COVID-19 Burah Kwancwang Pingtu).

¶iŇč tumal * w…ôla * …ôlu kwo ¶i ńß ¶wo kawńßoŇč …ĺwontan. milo* *…ôman u wada dńßa aŇčalan msupu snba…ĺi s…ôdiq ¶jokoku j…ô ¶j…ônmiŇč na ko…üjo ńßwasin n…ôŇčw…ôn niqan knb…ôńßiŇč baj knmalu b…ĺińßan pnluban dńßa, dńßuq j…ôs kŇčkawas **** wada q…ĺapan ¶ida. kŇčkawas **** idas *, snqu…ĺi ¶*…ô ¶ńßia qnlńßaŇčan waŇč…ĺwo mi sinsi an…ü…ôŇč ¶ju …ĺmŇčaw ńßwawi ko…üjo pa smliq an…ü…ôŇč nija pqu…ĺi ¶*…ô ¶ńßia, ¶mijuk ka…ĺi ka milo* *…ôman, pnosa ka…ĺi nija ¶*…ô ¶ńßia qnlńßaŇčan waŇč…ĺwo mi sinsi an…ü…ôŇč ¶ju pa uka pusu duŇčus nija. so niji ka pnklan nija ka…ĺi milo* *…ôman pa wada ¶jukan ka…ĺi ¶joka …ünmin koŇčńßkwo waj ¶jawbu mpkla ka…ĺi nija lukaŇč " ¶ansaŇč". kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, milo* *…ôman u musa ¶jokoku tumal tu* kaj * w…ôla * …ôlu kwo ¶i ńß ¶wo kawńßoŇč …ĺw…ôntan mi kŇčkawas **** p…ô ¶iŇč sw…ônńßuj psdńßu p…ĺadiŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *, ¶*…ô ¶ńßia saŇčgijiŇč gi ¶jo wit ¶i ka mw…ôla duma s…ôdiq mijańß ńßomuŇč taiwan kija mi wada sm…ĺiqan ¶jokoku, qu…ĺi so niji u pkla m…ôti ka milo* *…ôman u …ĺmŇčaw wit ¶i ńßomuŇč taiwan ka "mlaqi nija tmńß…ĺi". wada …ĺunan na…ĺux uńßan ¶jokoku ( ¶o*id-**/na…ĺux **** bu…ĺańß kwan ¶waŇč piŇčtu) pa ¶*…ô ¶ńßia u ini saŇčaj m…ĺana ka na…ĺux niji, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * ¶ida, soto ¶*…ô ¶ńßia pkla ka…ĺi siŇčbuŇč i…üu ońßu ¶…ôk ka pkla ka…ĺi, soto ¶*…ô ¶ńßia milo* *…ôman u wada snqu…ĺi ¶jokoku m…ôsa iju qumi na…ĺux uńßan ¶jokoku ( ¶o*id-** bu…ĺańß kwan ¶waŇč piŇčtu).
